vocab.meaning: vươn tới những vì sao (chỉ các tòa nhà cực cao)
vocab.example: The new luxury apartments in my district literally reach for the stars, dominating the local skyline.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn bao quát từ trên cao
vocab.example: Residents living on the upper floors of those skyscrapers enjoy a spectacular bird's-eye view of the entire city.

vocab.meaning: thay đổi hoàn toàn diện mạo của cái gì
vocab.example: The construction of several high-rises has completely changed the face of my once quiet neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: In a burgeoning metropolis like mine, towering structures are part and parcel of the local environment.
Over the past decade, massive office blocks have started to spring up like mushrooms near my residence.

vocab.meaning: ở trung tâm của cái gì
vocab.example: Living at the heart of the business district means I am constantly surrounded by imposing glass towers.
In my suburban area, tall buildings are few and far between as most structures are traditional bungalows.

vocab.meaning: bị thay thế bởi cái gì
vocab.example: The old, low-rise shops are gradually giving way to modern, high-density apartment complexes.
Around here, living in a 30-story building has become the norm due to the extreme scarcity of land.

vocab.meaning: bắt mắt, thu hút sự chú ý
vocab.example: There is an eye-catching skyscraper nearby with a unique twisting design that attracts many tourists.
